name: Fishing League
author: Poki
description: Fishing League is a fishing game where the goal is to climb the ranks and become the ultimate angler! Start with a simple wooden rod, catch fish, sell them, and upgrade your gear to reel in rare and valuable catches. Track your collection, challenge friends, and see who has the best rod and the rarest fish! Can you rise to the top of the league? How to play Fishing League? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Fish: left click or press the space bar Who created Fishing League? Fishing League is created by OnRush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io , Eat the world , Shipo.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , Burger Bounty , MagicLand.io , Sprint League | Brainrot Tsunami and TexasWorm.io ! How can I play Fishing League for free? You can play Fishing League for free on Poki. Can I play Fishing League on mobile devices and desktop? Fishing League can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Fishing League with my friend? Yes! Fishing League is a multiplayer game so you can play with your friends online!
